mechanism_narrative: A positive 3-month trend in retail sales signals accelerating household demand and near-term revenue growth, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days when RSAFS momentum is positive.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS vintage value available for 2012-02-01 was 407805.0
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month RSAFS momentum is followed by 20-day S&P 500 returns below the unconditional mean in more than 55% of walk-forward observations.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in unemployment signals weakening income growth and rising recession risk, causing investors to cut equity exposure and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3pp over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE vintage value available for 2012-03-01 was 8.2
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if their mean return is not below the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: Rising consumer prices while the federal funds rate remains near zero lowers real policy rates but raises margin and inflation-risk concerns, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL rises more than 1.0% over 3 months while FEDFUNDS is below 0.25
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL vintage value for 2012-03-01 was 229.098 and FEDFUNDS was 0.13
failure_condition: Reject if the joint trigger is followed by 60-day S&P 500 returns above the unconditional mean in more than 55% of triggered observations.

mechanism_narrative: A downturn in industrial production signals weakening real activity and lower operating leverage for cyclicals, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO vintage value available for 2012-02-01 was 96.2095
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO downside crossings are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of triggered cases.

mechanism_narrative: Rising housing starts combined with falling unemployment signals a self-reinforcing domestic expansion through construction, durable goods, and income channels, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST rises more than 10% over 6 months while UNRATE falls over the same 6 months
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST vintage value for 2012-02-01 was 698.0 and UNRATE for 2012-03-01 was 8.2
failure_condition: Reject if the joint housing-labor trigger produces 60-day S&P 500 returns below the unconditional mean in more than 50% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: A policy-rate tightening crossing raises discount rates and tightens financial conditions, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days after FEDFUNDS begins rising from its prior range.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS rises by at least 0.25pp over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS vintage value available for 2012-03-01 was 0.13
failure_condition: Reject if FEDFUNDS tightening triggers are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or by average returns above baseline.

mechanism_narrative: Positive real GDP growth reflects broad demand expansion and supports expected earnings, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days when GDPC1 growth is positive.
evidence_refs: fact:GDPC1 vintage value available for 2011-10-01 was 13429.0
failure_condition: Reject if positive GDPC1 growth has a walk-forward Rank IC below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window or if 60-day returns are not above baseline.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll expansion paired with a falling unemployment rate signals broad labor demand and income gains, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days as equity markets price stronger earnings conditions.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS rises over 3 months while UNRATE falls by at least 0.2pp over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS vintage value for 2012-03-01 was 132821.0 and UNRATE was 8.2
failure_condition: Reject if the joint labor trigger is followed by 5-day S&P 500 returns below the unconditional mean in more than 55% of triggered observations.
